title: Light-Up LED Friends Are Like Stars Glass Starlight Bottle Gift | Cute Friendship Gifts For Women | Special & Sentimental Best Friend Presents For Women On Birthday & Christmas
features: LIGHT UP YOUR FRIENDS DAY - Struggling to find special best friend gifts? Whether it's for her birthday or Christmas, this unique light up bottle is sure to put a smile on your best friends face.
HEART-WARMING SENTIMENT - Finished with a heart-warming 'Friends Are Like Stars' sentiment to show your best friend just how much she means to you! This Bottle makes a great meaningful gift for her.
STAR SHAPED LED LIGHTS - Containing homely LED lights that create a starry effect, this light up bottle will look gorgeous in any home! Simply add 3 AAA batteries to power the LED lights.
A PREMIUM QUALITY GIFT - This light up friend bottle is made up of high-quality glass and long lasting LED lights, ensuring that it's a special gift for a special friend.
COMES WITH A GIFT TAG - Finished with a lovely gift tag, this light up friends bottle is super easy to give as a best friend birthday gift or as a Christmas gift for friends!
description: From the manufacturer LIGHT UP YOUR FRIENDS DAY Brighten up someone's day with this gorgeous Starlight bottle. This is the perfect gift for a special Friend, with a touching sentiment on the front of the bottle and lovely star shaped LED's inside.
